name: Hololive Advent and Justice Roommates
description:
Made this cause of boredom and I'm in a big advent/justice mood, don't wanna do too much for the description cause too lazy so I'll just say that the roommate bots for both of these gens have more intro messages to em (I forget if there's more since the last time), and also so does my HoloX bot.

And here have a Liz: Booba

Edit: This definitely needs some more work on it as it doesn't understand who's in advent and who isn't very quickly it seems
creator: Pandapple
